summary: Iteration 4 end-to-end validation of the Attio pagination fix, email-aliases mapping, lazy recording fetch and full-corpus stats aggregation. Backend: 14/14 new pytest cases PASS in 4.6s — total meetings 2855 (>=2500), top items sorted desc with 2028 dates on top, source split attio=2841 + both=6 + fireflies=8. /api/meetings/unmapped-participants returns real participant emails (pushpak@harden.run, pushpak@vizops.ai, kartik@vizops.ai, everyone@vizops.ai, pushpendre@vizops.ai) with counts and last_meeting, total_known_employees=18, properly admin-gated (employee gets 403), admin excluded. PUT /api/employees/emp_0_9541/email-aliases with [pushpak@vizops.ai] -> /employees/emp_0_9541/meetings returns total=1067 == stats.total_meetings=1067 (Mongo aggregation matches paginated total), top_meeting_partners = pushpendre(392), kishore(104), rishav(89), kartik(78), everyone(67) — exact spec match. Aliases dedupe + lowercase; 404 on unknown employee. Lazy GET /api/meetings/{id}/recordings returns {recordings, cached}. Regression: search?q=BCG returns 6+ sorted desc, single GET 200, action-items 200. Frontend: Meetings Hub stats 2855/2847/14/8 visible, PeopleMappingPanel '20 unmapped meeting participants' renders below sync banner with toggle, expand reveals link-btn-* per participant, dialog has employee-select-trigger + confirm-link-btn. EmployeeMeetingsSection on /employees/emp_0_9541 has alias-input + add-alias-btn — adding 'pushpak@vizops.ai' updates stats (1067 visible) and partner names, remove-alias-<email> works (toast 'Removed alias'). Drawer opens for Attio card and fires 2 /recordings lazy calls. Timeline tab + prev/today/next buttons present. Cleanup: aliases cleared on emp_0_9541.

issues: Lazy GET /api/meetings/{id}/recordings is fired twice when the drawer opens (likely React StrictMode double-effect or two effects depending on the same id). Endpoint is idempotent and persists to Mongo so it's just a minor perf nit — consider an AbortController or single useEffect guard.

action_items: Optional: dedupe duplicate GET /api/meetings/{id}/recordings call on drawer open (one fire-and-cache is enough).
critical_code_review_comments: Attio pagination fix verified: list_meetings now correctly traverses response.pagination.next_cursor (sort=start_desc) — 2855 meetings ingested (was 208 pre-fix). Source mix: attio=2841 + both=6 + fireflies=8.

Full-corpus stats aggregation on /api/employees/{id}/meetings is correct: total (count_documents) == stats.total_meetings (aggregation pipeline). Top partners group by lowered email and exclude self via $nin — verified with emp_0_9541 + alias=pushpak@vizops.ai returning 1067 and partners pushpendre/kishore/rishav/kartik/everyone exactly per spec.
PUT /api/employees/{id}/email-aliases sanitises (lowercase + trim + dedupe + drop empties) and returns the canonical list. 404 on unknown employee id is enforced.
GET /api/meetings/unmapped-participants is admin-gated, excludes both primary emails and aliases of known employees, returns name/count/last_meeting and total_known_employees. Limit honored.
Lazy /api/meetings/{id}/recordings persists fetched recordings to meetings_cache and reports cached flag — good caching behaviour. 404 on unknown id verified.

All required data-testids present and wired: people-mapping-panel, toggle-mapping-panel-btn, link-btn-<email>, employee-select-trigger, confirm-link-btn, employee-meetings-section, alias-input, add-alias-btn, alias-<email>, remove-alias-<email>, tab-timeline, timeline-prev/today/next-btn.
Minor: drawer triggers /recordings twice — see action item.

success_rate.frontend: 100% — every required UI flow & data-testid verified

seed_data_creation: None. Temporarily added alias 'pushpak@vizops.ai' to emp_0_9541 during testing and CLEANED UP (PUT email-aliases=[]) at the end of every test run.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Regression suite: pytest /app/backend/tests/test_meetings_iteration4.py /app/backend/tests/test_meetings_hub.py /app/backend/tests/test_meetings_enrichment.py -v. Live counts to assert in 2026-06: total meetings ~2855, attio total (attio+both) ~2847, fireflies ~14, with-recordings ~8, total_known_employees=18, top unmapped participant=pushpak@harden.run (1757), emp_0_9541 + alias=pushpak@vizops.ai => total=1067 (partners pushpendre=392,kishore=104,rishav=89,kartik=78,everyone=67). Always clean aliases after alias tests by PUT email-aliases=[]. Fireflies live sync still rate-limited; do not re-trigger.
rca of the issue: N/A — no blocking bugs found. All session-fix features (pagination, alias mapping, lazy recordings, full-corpus stats) verified end-to-end.
